zh.lifeSummary: Matilda Loudham是Walter Loudham I和Dama En Blanco的女兒，於1253年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾洛達哈姆。她和John de Heriz II至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1305年在英國德比夏爾素斯 文費爾德享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: Loudham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Matilda Loudham was born in 1253, in Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Walter Loudham I and Dama En Blanco. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with John de Heriz II. She died in 1305, in South Wingfield, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Matilda Loudham est née en 1253, à Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Walter Loudham I et Dama En Blanco. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec John de Heriz II. Elle est décédée en 1305, à South Wingfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Loudhamは1253年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロウドハムでWalter Loudham IとDama En Blancoの娘として生まれた。彼女はJohn de Heriz IIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1305年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアソウス ウィングフィールドで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Loudham(은)는 1253년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 로드함에서 Walter Loudham I(와)과 Dama En Blanco의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 John de Heriz II(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1305년 영국 더비실르 소우스 윙필드에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Matilda Loudham родилась в 1253 г. в местности лоудхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Walter Loudham I и Dama En Blanco. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от John de Heriz II. Она умерла в 1305 г. в местности соут вингфиелд, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.
